title: Create: Think Bigger! V2.5
description:
Create: Think Bigger V2.5 IS OUT!!!
#CTB
Welcome to "Create: Think Bigger!", a modpack based around mod "Create".
Only NeoForge.
body:
# WELCOME TO THE CREATE: THINK BIGGER! ūüíĽ

![ctbv2.5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eab52cf0ee1570f038c3b4c41c43a8b6cf52e48c.png)

Hello! Are ***YOU*** looking for a cool modpack based around the mod ["Create"](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)?

Well you're in the right place!

This modpack has alot of Create addons, perfomance mods and QoL mods!

## Found bugs?

If you find bugs, please report it in out [Github issue tracker](https://github.com/CreateThinkBigger/Create-Think-Bigger/issues) or in our [Discord](https://discord.gg/2RQc4kEGdT) bug reports.


## Is your game crashing?

Upload the logs to [mclo.gs!](https://mclo.gs), and send the link in one of our channels specified above.

Rehosting: **NO!** You may **NOT** rehost (reupload) this modpack on any website you have to link back to this page if you want to make a post about this modpack.

## FAQ!

Q - Is the modpack availible on CurseForge?\
A - No, the modpack is only availible on Modrinth.

Q - How can I recieve the update messages?\
A - If you follow the modpack you will recieve the messages about the updates! Or you can join                   our [Discrod server](https://discord.gg/2RQc4kEGdT) to get pinged!

Q - Is there a Fabric version?\
A - No, there is no Fabric version and probably won't be.

Q - Is there a server with this modpack?\
A - YES! Join from the latest version! IP: createthinkbigger.sparkedservers.us
